projectDescription: An AI-powered sentiment analysis platform that classifies customer comments as positive or negative, supporting both single-text and bulk CSV analysis with statistics and export capabilities.
keyFeatures: AI-powered sentiment classification (POSITIVO/NEGATIVO) with probability scores
Single comment real-time analysis via dashboard
Bulk CSV upload for mass comment processing (up to 3MB)
Statistics panel showing positive/negative percentages across recent comments
CSV export of analysis results for offline reporting
JWT-based authentication with secure HTTP-only session cookies
Backend API integration via configurable NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL environment variable
publicApiSurface: POST /login — Authenticate user and receive JWT token
POST /sentiment — Analyze one or more text comments for sentiment
POST /sentiment/upload-csv — Upload a CSV file for bulk sentiment analysis
POST /sentiment/export-csv — Export analysis results as a downloadable CSV
GET /stats?size={n} — Retrieve the N most recent sentiment analysis records with statistics
